positive: A detailed, stylized illustration of a majestic fox sitting amidst delicate botanical elements. The fox should have a sleek, minimalist silhouette against a dramatic, deep turquoise and burnt orange color gradient. The flora includes stylized ferns, geometric leaves, and subtle mandalas woven around the animal. The composition is central and balanced, giving a strong visual focal point. Style is a modern, clean vector illustration, highly suitable for apparel printing. Lighting should be flat and even, maximizing contrast and crisp lines. Minimalist, abstract, kawaii yet elegant feel.
negative: blur, grainy, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, poor anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, messy, jpeg artifacts, muted, dull colors
